title: myrtus ugni var. angustifolia
intro: Myrtus ugni var. angustifolia, also known as Chilean pepper tree or Myrtus ugni, is a plant species belonging to the family Myrtaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its antiseptic and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Myrtus ugni var. angustifolia include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make tea or taken as a supplement to harness its medicinal properties.
